name: io.github.New1Direction/korg-ledger
description: Verifiable-cognition MCP server. korg_verify proves an agent's session ledger is tamper-evident; korg_audit audits your own Claude Code logs zero-config; korg_import replays any vendor's session into a hash-chained korg-ledger@v1 journal. Make any agent's cognition checkable.

runtimeArguments.description: the korgex subcommand that runs the MCP server

environmentVariables.name: KORG_JOURNAL_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the JSONL ledger journal (defaults to .korg/journal.jsonl).

environmentVariables.name: KORG_LEDGER_HMAC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional HMAC key — makes the chain tamper-PROOF, not just tamper-evident.
